purpose: Draft internal knowledge-base updates from approved meeting notes and route them to a human editor before publication.
review_cadence: Monthly, and before adding any new connector or external output destination.

agents.name: Meeting Notes Summarizer
agents.identity: Shared automation account with read-only notes access
agents.human_checkpoint: Coordinator reviews summary before it enters the draft workspace.
agents.notes: No customer or credential data should be placed in meeting notes.

agents.name: Knowledge Base Drafter
agents.human_checkpoint: Editor must approve every CMS draft before publication.
agents.notes: Drafting is allowed; publishing is not.

agents.name: Publish Readiness Checker
agents.identity: Local script run by editor account
agents.human_checkpoint: Editor resolves flags and manually publishes if appropriate.
agents.notes: Checker does not publish, email, spend, or change account settings.

handoffs.payload: CMS draft URL and source list

shared_boundaries.secrets_boundary: No credentials, private customer records, payroll data, student records, or API keys may be entered into the workflow.
shared_boundaries.public_action_boundary: No agent may publish publicly, send external email, buy services, or change permissions. Humans perform those actions manually after review.
shared_boundaries.audit_evidence: Keep summary approval, draft history, checker output, editor notes, and final publish decision in the project folder.
shared_boundaries.rollback_owner: Documentation lead owns draft rollback; site owner owns public page rollback after publication.

review_triggers: Adding a new connector or output destination
Introducing customer, student, patient, payroll, credential, or other sensitive data
Changing from draft-only to write/publish permissions
A failed handoff, missing log, or unexpected tool action
notes: Example is fictional and intended for local review practice, not as a security or compliance certification.
